clusters.justification: These terms map onto limbic and salience network co-activations involved in processing valence, arousal, and internal emotional states.
These terms are united by the striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry responsible for assigning subjective worth to stimuli and guiding goal-directed choice.
These terms reflect default mode network co-activations that support abstracted, internally generated representations of the self, personal history, and other agents.
